title: Oklo Stock Rises. Can Regulatory Progress Offset the Nuclear Start-Up’s Slump?
sentences: Can Regulatory Progress Offset the Nuclear Start-Up’s Slump?
Oklo is one of 10 nuclear companies selected to participate in a pilot program aiming to get at least three test reactors live by July.
